blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the overbooking algorithm.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the overbooking algorithm.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the overbooking algorithm, specifically the ability to book 105% of capacity. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that directly confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for an overbooking algorithm but lacks specific data or endpoints to validate its implementation, leading to an inconclusive status.
